summary: Iteration 16: Interactive LiveDemo component fully verified - all features working correctly including prompt input, example prompts, agent status bar, file tree, code streaming, agent activity log, progress bar, completion CTA, and reset functionality. All existing landing page sections preserved.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns 200 {'status': 'healthy'}
Frontend: Live demo section (data-testid='live-demo-section') exists on landing page
Frontend: Demo section heading 'See it in action — no signup required' displayed correctly
Frontend: Demo prompt input (data-testid='demo-prompt-input') visible in idle state
Frontend: Demo Generate button (data-testid='demo-run-btn') exists and styled correctly
Frontend: All 3 example prompt buttons (data-testid='demo-example-0/1/2') visible and clickable
Frontend: Clicking example prompt triggers generation - prompt input hides
Frontend: 6 agent status indicators appear (architect, frontend, backend, security, qa, devops)
Frontend: Progress bar animates during generation
Frontend: File tree populates with 7 files during generation
Frontend: Code viewer (data-testid='demo-code-viewer') shows streaming code with syntax highlighting
Frontend: Agent activity log (data-testid='demo-agent-log') shows agent messages in real-time
Frontend: After completion (~50s), 'Start Building for Free' CTA button (data-testid='demo-signup-cta') appears
Frontend: Completion badge shows 'Generation complete — 7 files, 6 agents, under 60 seconds'
Frontend: All 6 agents show completed status (green checkmark styling)
Frontend: 'Try another' reset button (data-testid='demo-reset-btn') returns to idle state with prompt visible
Frontend: Navbar 'Live Demo' link scrolls to demo section correctly
Frontend: Stats strip preserved (4/4 values: 50,000+, 99.9%, 6 AI Agents, <59s deploy)
Frontend: Comparison section preserved (traditional vs cursorcode cards)
Frontend: Testimonials section preserved (3/3 testimonial cards)
Frontend: Pricing section preserved (5/5 pricing plans: starter, standard, pro, premier, ultra)
Frontend: Final CTA buttons preserved (final-cta-btn, final-pricing-btn)
critical_code_review_comments: LiveDemo.js uses excellent data-testid coverage for all interactive elements
Demo is frontend-only simulation (no backend calls) - MOCKED simulation data
Code streaming uses character-by-character animation with proper async timing
File tree items are clickable and switch code viewer content correctly
Agent status bar uses proper visual states: idle (gray), active (colored+spinner), complete (green+checkmark)
Progress bar animates smoothly using framer-motion
Reset functionality properly clears all state (cancelRef prevents memory leaks)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 verified the new LiveDemo component at /app/frontend/src/components/LiveDemo.js. The demo runs entirely client-side with simulated data (no backend calls). Key features: (1) Idle state shows prompt input + 3 example prompt buttons, (2) Clicking example triggers ~50s generation with agent status bar (6 agents), file tree (7 files), code streaming, and agent activity log, (3) Completion shows 'Start Building for Free' CTA + completion badge, (4) Reset button returns to idle. All data-testid selectors work correctly. All existing landing page sections (stats, comparison, testimonials, pricing, CTA) preserved.
mocked_features: LiveDemo uses SIMULATED data - no real AI generation or backend calls. All code files and agent messages are hardcoded in DEMO_FILES and AGENT_MESSAGES constants.
